nasb.text: the blessing, if you listen to the commandments of the Lord your God, which I am commanding you today;

esv.text: the blessing, if you obey the commandments of the Lord your God, which I command you today,

cnv.text: 如果你們聽從耶和華你們的　神的誡命，就是我今日吩咐你們的，你們就必蒙賜福；

ccb.text: 你们若遵行我今天吩咐你们的诫命，就会得到祝福。
